channel.title: v3.3.2 on XSpec
channel.description: Recent content in v3.3.2 on XSpec

item.title: Release XSpec v3.3.2
item.description: Release XSpec v3.3.2 XSpec 3.3 upgrades its XProc harnesses to XProc 3 and adds support for XQS as the Schematron implementation. These are the highlights of XSpec v3.3: Common to Languages Under Test In the x:expect element, the new, optional result-type attribute describes the sequence type you expect for the actual result. XSpec checks the type before evaluating @test, so an unexpected type leads to an ordinary failure instead of a type error.
